title: Al-Rashid's Journeying to al-Rayy in Order to Investigate Complaints against the Governor of Khurisin, 'Ali b. Isa b. Mahan, and His Confirmation of 'Ali in Office
description: to Investigate Complaints against the Governor of Khurdsdn, All b. `Isa b. Mahan, and His Confirmation of All in Office
